name: claude-hud
description: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code

scripts.check:dist: npm run build && npm run verify:release && git diff --exit-code -- dist
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run verify:release
scripts.test:stdin: npm run build && echo '{"model":{"display_name":"Opus"},"context_window":{"current_usage":{"input_tokens":45000},"context_window_size":200000},"transcript_path":"/tmp/test.jsonl"}' | node dist/index.js

author: Jarrod Watts
